title: Key prefix via template literal — `prefix_${K}` rename
description: TS 4.1+ key remapping: `{[K in keyof T as `prefix_${K & string}`]: T[K]}`. Resolves to a fully concrete object literal with renamed keys; each value type is carried over unchanged. Common pattern for DB column-name prefixing (`user_id`, `user_name`).
generated: function YOw_pb7jNdR(v){return (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && Number.isFinite(v.user_id) && typeof v.user_name === 'string')}
